text.title: continuous-discovery Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for continuous-discovery as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM hallucinating competitor pricing or changelog entries when scrapes fail, reporting "$49 → $99 price hike" without a source.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without source_url + fetched_at + raw_hash triple enforced at schema level, fabricated diffs are indistinguishable from real ones. Enforce the triple and reject completions missing any field.

failure-mode.description: Daily haiku watchers overwriting shared files instead of appending.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Concurrent agents writing to the same file produce corrupt outputs. Use atomic JSONL append + lock file, never Write on shared logs.

failure-mode.description: Bi-weekly synthesis with full week's signals exceeding context window.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-summarize per-day with haiku, feed only summaries to opus for synthesis — never pass raw haiku dumps directly to the synthesizer.

failure-mode.description: Review-mining agent asserting "competitor X has churn" from headlines rather than verbatim quotes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require quote-level evidence (verbatim text + source URL) before any sentiment claim — summary paraphrases hallucinate sentiment direction.

failure-mode.description: "New entrant" agent over-triggering on rebrands of existing players.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Match on domain + founders + funding history, not just name. A rebrand of a known competitor is not a new entrant.

failure-mode.description: Agents trained on generic content drift into "industry analyst" voice — strip vague predictions, require evidence rows for every claim.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Industry-analyst voice produces unfalsifiable forecasts. Every claim must have an evidence row with source + URL.

failure-mode.description: Subagents that write to Notion/Airtable via API can dup rows on retry.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require idempotency key (hash of competitor_id + signal_type + raw_hash); never let retry produce duplicate signal records.

failure-mode.description: Privacy / ToS: avoid LinkedIn / Glassdoor scraping; use Apollo/ZoomInfo via official API or skip those signals.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Scraping LinkedIn/Glassdoor violates ToS and attracts legal letters; official APIs are available for most signal types.

failure-mode.description: Translation drift: non-English changelogs translated by haiku lose nuance.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: For severity-≥4 events, force a sonnet re-read with translation memory; haiku translations degrade on technical/legal phrasing.

failure-mode.description: Long-running cron agents accumulate state drift.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Have market-strategist run a monthly schema-validation pass over competitor-registry.json + signals.jsonl to detect drift.

failure-mode.description: PII in scraped content (e.g. customer logos, support transcripts on review sites).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strip before feeding to non-ZDR endpoints; customer PII in model inputs is a compliance risk.

failure-mode.description: Recency bias: agents weight last-week signals over multi-quarter trends.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The bi-weekly synth must explicitly reweight against market-map.md history to prevent recency bias from dominating strategic output.

failure-mode.description: "Validation" framing creeps in — this scan informs decisions, it does not "validate" them.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Ban the word "validate" in synthesizer prompts; the scan surfaces signals, humans make decisions.
